name: Conditional Workflow
description: Execute a step only if a specific condition is met

steps.name: analyze-content
steps.prompt_template: Analyze the following content and respond with 'HAS_ERROR' if it contains errors, otherwise 'OK': {{input}}

steps.name: fix-errors
steps.prompt_template: Please fix the errors in this content: {{input}}

steps.name: final-output
steps.prompt_template: Provide the final version of the content: {{input}}
